decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: split_evenly returns a list of n integer amounts that SUM EXACTLY to total_cents, and any two of the amounts differ by at most 1 cent (so no money is lost or created and the split is even).
The change modifies only the billing module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It distributes the remainder cents one per part across the first parts (e.g. via divmod), rather than dropping them, rounding floats, or piling the whole remainder onto a single part.
